raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Week four check-in","name":"What's been most on your mind at work lately, Aisha?","description":"Safe opener that lets Aisha choose the most relevant thread before any friction is introduced.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"settling","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Decision rights map","name":"Where are decision rights still fuzzy for you in the work you're doing?","description":"Surfaces the specific situations where she is still unsure who decides versus who advises.","purpose":"topic","stage":"orientation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Alignment pressure","name":"What part of cross-functional alignment is taking more energy than it should?","description":"Finds the moments where she is spending effort decoding or smoothing instead of moving work forward.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"orientation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Consensus trap","name":"Where are you still waiting for consensus when you probably need a decision?","description":"Surfaces hesitation to move from alignment-seeking into decisive action.","purpose":"competency","stage":"blockers","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Partner expectations","name":"Which partner expectation feels hardest to read right now?","description":"Identifies the stakeholder relationship where expectations are most ambiguous or misaligned.","purpose":"topic","stage":"blockers","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support from me","name":"What would make my support more useful for you this month?","description":"Lets her name the guardrails, context, or escalation help she wants from her manager.","purpose":"topic","stage":"connection","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Boundary needed","name":"What boundary would make the planning work easier to run?","description":"Surfaces the practical limit or rule that would reduce ambiguity in her day-to-day work.","purpose":"topic","stage":"connection","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next decision","name":"What's the next decision you want to have made by our next check-in?","description":"Closes on a concrete decision or outcome she wants to move forward before the next conversation.","purpose":"competency","stage":"connection","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]}]}
